title: Young, Jacob - Parliamentary Under Secretary of State (Levelling Up), Department for Levelling Up, Housing and Communities - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Young left his role as Parliamentary Under Secretary of State (Levelling Up) in July 2024  Director for Corporate Affairs, Agilia Infrastructure Partners Ltd  Mr Young sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Agilia Infrastructure Partners Ltd. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in September 2024; and the appointment was taken up in October 2024. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
